subcodes.first_line: O faithful friends! Your letter was as a musk-laden breath from the divine rose-garden and the song and melody of the nightingale of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران باوفا نامه شما نفحه مشکین گلشن الهی بود و نغمه و آواز بلبل معانی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity in diversity
